question: What does 'online Costco' actually mean for Xinpinmu, and why is the Kirkland model the right comparison (not JD's 1P model)?

findings.claim: Duan Yongping explicitly compared Xinpinmu to the Costco model and predicted it would be 'quite formidable' in 10 years with ~4,000 SKUs
findings.data: Duan Yongping's exact quote on Xueqiu: '这个其实就是Costco的样子。拼多多如果线上品牌只有4000个左右的SKU的话，10年后会是相当厉害的。' Translation: 'This is essentially the Costco model. If PDD's online brand has around 4,000 SKUs, it will be quite formidable in 10 years.' He drew the parallel to Costco's first decade (1983-1993) where it focused on refining 4,000 SKUs rather than rapid expansion.

findings.claim: Duan Yongping proposed a 'brand licensing' model: PDD supervises quality and licenses the Xinpinmu brand to qualified factories, rather than operating factories itself
findings.data: Duan's view paraphrased: '拼多多不需要抢客户生意，只要扶植爆品公司就好，监督质量，达到标准就可以把自己的品牌授权给厂家。只需要选出某些有代表性的产品用来打自己的品牌就可以了。' Translation: 'PDD doesn't need to steal merchants' business, just nurture hit-product companies, supervise quality, and license its brand to qualified factories. It only needs to select certain representative products to build its own brand.'

findings.claim: 4,000 SKUs covers approximately 80% of high-frequency household consumption needs, creating a closed-loop consumer experience
findings.data: Analysis from TMTPost: 'From a coverage dimension, 4,000 SKUs correspond to the core radius of household essentials. Under this structure, 4,000 SKUs can cover approximately 80% of high-frequency consumption needs, forming a relatively complete consumption closed loop.' This shifts user behavior from multi-platform price comparison to single-platform decision-making.

findings.claim: Duan Yongping's '10 years' mirrors Costco's own foundational decade (1983-1993) when it refined selection, compressed costs, stabilized quality, and built trust before scaling
findings.data: TMTPost analysis: 'Costco自1983年成立后的第一个10年，并未急于开店，而是围绕4000个SKU打磨选品、压缩成本、稳定质量、建立信任。段永平所说的10年，并非时间本身，而是强调优质商业模式需要时间锤炼。' Translation: 'In its first 10 years after founding in 1983, Costco didn't rush to open stores but instead refined 4,000 SKUs, compressed costs, stabilized quality, and built trust. Duan's 10 years is not about the time itself but emphasizing that quality business models need time to be forged.'

findings.claim: Duan Yongping holds 7.75 million PDD shares (worth $906M) as of Q1 2025, making it his third-largest position — his endorsement is backed by significant capital commitment
findings.data: As of Q1 2025, Duan Yongping's H&H International Investment held 7.75 million PDD shares, market value exceeding $900 million, his third-largest holding. He increased his position by 908,800 shares (11.72% increase) in Q2. He was PDD founder Huang Zheng's angel investor and mentor.

findings.claim: Xinpinmu = Costco's curated model + PDD's traffic-matching efficiency + China's supply chain responsiveness — a fundamentally different proposition from JD's distributor model
findings.data: Multiple analyst summaries converge on this formula. Guancha analysis: 'Xinpinmu will adopt a selective approach: only choose certain representative products to build its own brands, not all commodities.' TMTPost: '新拼姆品牌=Costco的精选模式+PDD式流量匹配效率+Made in China的供应链响应.' This is brand creation (like Kirkland), not inventory distribution (like JD).
